name: Sanki Service Corporation
summary: Sanki Service Corporation provides maintenance services in Japan and internationally. The company offers preventive maintenance services for building facilities, such as air conditioners, electricity systems, kitchen and fire equipment, water supply, drainage and sanitation equipment, etc., as well as equipment maintenance and inspection services. It also provides facility construction and building management services; and services for environmental improvement projects, including pump inverters, heat source replacement, energy saving product sales, energy conservation consulting, energy monitoring equipment, LED lighting, solar power generation, and commercial products. The company serves commercial facilities/chain stores, hotels, hospitals/elderly facilities, and offices/buildings/apartments. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Himeji, Japan.
